/usr/bin/clang++-18 -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/datachannel-tests.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/datachannel-tests.dir/test/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/datachannel-tests.dir/test/connectivity.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/datachannel-tests.dir/test/negotiated.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/datachannel-tests.dir/test/reliability.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/datachannel-tests.dir/test/turn_connectivity.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/datachannel-tests.dir/test/track.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/datachannel-tests.dir/test/capi_connectivity.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/datachannel-tests.dir/test/capi_track.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/datachannel-tests.dir/test/websocket.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/datachannel-tests.dir/test/websocketserver.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/datachannel-tests.dir/test/capi_websocketserver.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/datachannel-tests.dir/test/benchmark.cpp.o" -o tests-0.24.1  -Wl,-rpath,/home/light/work/Video_Prj/QT_Prj/webrtc_26_3_3/webrtc/build/Desktop-Debug/3rdparty/libdatachannel libdatachannel.so.0.24.1
